backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing user profiles, trusted contacts, and encrypted message handling with access‑controlled queries and updates.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing token configuration setup for ckBTC/ckETH/ckUSDC with related files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Collection of brief summaries for all frontend source files used in the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and wraps the app with AuthGate, AppShell, and theme provider.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Gates app content behind Internet Identity authentication and triggers profile setup for new users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading states and retry logic.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenR: Displays the user's token receiving address with copy‑to‑clipboard support and fallback when unavailable.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenS: UI for entering destination and amount to send tokens, with validation and placeholder send logic.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Tokens: Renders token cards with receive/send tabs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC using token config and principal address.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Transp: Displays transport key diagnostic states and allows copying a JSON blob of diagnostic info to the clipboard.
Provides the main app layout with header navigation, login button, routed content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/messages/Diagnos: Shows messaging eligibility diagnostics and enables copying detailed diagnostic JSON for troubleshooting.
frontend/src/components/messages/Iso2002: Form-based ISO 20022 message editor with live raw preview generation.
frontend/src/components/messages/RawPrev: Displays raw generated message content and offers clipboard copy functionality.
frontend/src/components/messages/SwiftCo: Form-based SWIFT MT message editor with dynamic raw preview generation.
frontend/src/config/tokens.ts: Defines token configs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC and provides helpers to check and retrieve token settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, handling login, stored identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfiles.ts: React hooks for fetching and updating user profiles via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Hooks for retrieving and sending encrypted messages through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncStatus.ts: Fetches relationship sync status between the caller and another principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransportKey.ts: Manages transport key generation, storage, restoration, and backend registration tied to vetKeys.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrustedContacts.ts: Hooks for retrieving, adding, removing, and checking trusted contacts using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base and theme variables for light and dark modes with custom color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Implements hybrid AES-GCM and RSA-OAEP encryption/decryption for end‑to‑end message payloads.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/transportKeys.ts: Generates, imports, exports, and persists RSA-OAEP transport keypairs for local encryption use.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/iso20022: Defines an ISO 20022 message type with helpers to create empty messages, generate XML, and parse XML back into structured data.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/swift.ts: Defines a SWIFT MT103 message type with functions to create empty messages, generate raw SWIFT text, and parse raw messages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ComposeMessagePage.ts: Provides a UI for composing ISO 20022 or SWIFT messages, handling recipient selection, sync status, encryption, and sending.
frontend/src/pages/ContactsPage.tsx: Shows trusted contacts, their readiness status, and allows adding, removing, and refreshing contact sync information.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays user identity, transport key status, and actions for generating keys and navigating to message composition.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Lists sent and received messages with sender info and timestamps, allowing navigation to message details.
frontend/src/pages/MessageDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed message info, attempts decryption, parses ISO20022 or SWIFT content, and shows sender/recipient profiles.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal for creating a user profile by collecting a name and saving it via a profile mutation.
frontend/src/utils/base64.ts: Provides helpers to convert between Uint8Array/ArrayBuffer and base64 strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters and related sessionStorage values.
frontend/src/utils/vetKey.ts: Manages generation, validation, storage, and cleanup of session-scoped vetKey identifiers for transport keys.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, layout, animations, and activating plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing configuration tasks for setting correct ledger canister IDs for ckBTC/ckETH/ckUSDC.
